message:
fix: Handle subnormal floats and BigInt Pow threshold in round()

Two key fixes:
1. Added two-step scaling for subnormal floats when ndigits causes
   multiplier overflow. E.g., round(1.4e-315, 315) now works correctly
   by first scaling to normal range (10^307), then applying remaining
   ndigits (8), then scaling back.

2. Fixed isBigIntExpression Pow threshold from 63 to 20 to match
   codegen (arithmetic.zig:1013). This prevents type mismatch when
   codegen uses BigInt.pow() for 2**31 but assignment didn't expect it.

Also improved PyValue.bigint detection in round() using runtime tag
comparison with std.meta.FieldEnum for more reliable union handling.
